jokes.text: never slept with a lot strange women, although I wanted to, they wouldn't... you know...
jokes.setup: Richard listing his virtuous lifestyle choices
jokes.punchline: The trail-off revealing his lack of sexual success wasn't by choice
jokes.explanation: Classic Richard Lewis neurotic self-deprecation with perfect timing and character voice

jokes.text: Fuck family. You know, and you know what's pissing me off? I'm so low on that list, that kidney transplant list.
jokes.setup: Discussion about family member in coma potentially donating kidney
jokes.punchline: Richard's blunt dismissal of family loyalty in favor of self-interest
jokes.explanation: Brutally honest character moment that's both shocking and perfectly in character for Richard

jokes.text: Well, if you were a little bigger celebrity, you'd be on the top of the list too.
jokes.setup: Richard lamenting Mickey Mantle got his liver transplant quickly
jokes.punchline: Larry's matter-of-fact observation about celebrity privilege in medical care
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dark comedy observing real systemic inequity with Larry's characteristic bluntness

jokes.text: if you're doing an Andy Williams summer show.
jokes.setup: Richard asking how his sweater looks
jokes.punchline: Larry's specific and dated reference to mock the sweater's style
jokes.explanation: Solid insult with specific cultural reference that adds precision to the burn

jokes.text: He's kind of a 'slam, bam, thank you, ma'am' kind of guy, right? No, not really at all. No? No. No slamming, no bamming. No thanking the ma'am.
jokes.setup: Larry assuming Jeff is sexually aggressive
jokes.punchline: Lisa's systematic deconstruction of each element of the phrase
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay that builds through repetition and systematic breakdown

jokes.text: He was like that. I mean, it was dark, but honest to god it was... like that. [gesture implying tiny size]
jokes.setup: Lisa describing Jeff's sexual shortcomings
jokes.punchline: Her gesture indicating extremely small penis size
jokes.explanation: Physical comedy that's crude but effective in building the Jeff small penis storyline

jokes.text: It was like a peanut. That little... All right. This is a very... you know, way too much information here, okay?
jokes.setup: Lisa continuing to describe Jeff's anatomy
jokes.punchline: Larry's uncomfortable reaction to the TMI
jokes.explanation: Good cringe comedy with Larry's characteristic discomfort at inappropriate sharing

jokes.text: I just would think that that's something that friends men would talk about. No, nobody ever talks about that. Really?
jokes.setup: Lisa assuming men discuss penis sizes with friends
jokes.punchline: Larry's matter-of-fact correction of this assumption
jokes.explanation: Nice observational humor about gender communication differences

jokes.text: Big vagina?! Gigantic vagina! What?! Biggest vagina known to man! Huge!
jokes.setup: Larry telling Jeff what Lisa said about him
jokes.punchline: Jeff's escalating counter-accusations about Lisa's anatomy
jokes.explanation: Brilliant escalation with Jeff's indignant over-the-top response becoming increasingly absurd

jokes.text: These big vagina ladies are getting away with murder.
jokes.setup: Larry and Jeff discussing the injustice of women blaming men for sexual incompatibility
jokes.punchline: Larry's serious tone treating this as a social justice issue
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry David absurdist logic treating ridiculous premise with complete seriousness

jokes.text: I think you've been waiting for this man to die so you can get one of his organs, preferably his kidney
jokes.setup: Doctor confronting Larry about his frequent visits
jokes.punchline: The doctor's accurate but blunt assessment of Larry's motives
jokes.explanation: Dark comedy from calling out Larry's transparent selfishness with medical precision

jokes.text: That's pretty good... pretty good work. Thank you, thank you. He got me. Good job, doctor.
jokes.setup: Larry being accused of waiting for someone to die
jokes.punchline: Larry appreciating the doctor's detective work like it's a performance
jokes.explanation: Brilliant character moment showing Larry's twisted appreciation for being caught

jokes.text: Well, if you're the bottom of the list, you're fucked.
jokes.setup: Discussion about kidney transplant waiting lists
jokes.punchline: George's blunt assessment delivered matter-of-factly
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective dark humor with perfect economy and timing

jokes.text: Edible undies? Oh, dear.
jokes.setup: Larry finding something the private investigator left behind
jokes.punchline: The revelation of what the mysterious object is and their reaction
jokes.explanation: Setup for later payoff with solid awkward discovery comedy

jokes.text: And at no point, he says to you, 'Hey, what about the fat guy that just threw me off the roof?' That would never come up. I said it's bad version.
jokes.setup: Larry's plan to save Ben's life by pushing him off a building then catching him
jokes.punchline: Jeff pointing out the obvious flaw and Larry's dismissive response
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry David logic with meta-awareness of his own absurd planning

jokes.text: It's like you didn't even hit it.
jokes.setup: Larry trying to damage Ben's car to create rescue opportunity
jokes.punchline: Jeff's observation about Larry's pathetic attempt at vandalism
jokes.explanation: Good physical comedy commentary with Jeff's deadpan delivery

jokes.text: What happened, I was listening to jewish radio and they were talking about Israel and I got so worked up I lost control of my car.
jokes.setup: Larry explaining how he hit Ben's car
jokes.punchline: The ridiculous but character-specific excuse involving Jewish identity
jokes.explanation: Perfect Larry David character moment mixing identity politics with ridiculous behavior

jokes.text: No no no no no. Uh, thank you... thank you for that invitation, but I cannot go to the baseball game on the Sabbath, I'm sorry. It's impossible.
jokes.setup: Ben on phone during lunch
jokes.punchline: His strict religious observance conflicting with his Yankees fandom
jokes.explanation: Good character establishment showing religious devotion vs. personal desires

jokes.text: My yarmulke almost fell off, I'm so taken aback.
jokes.setup: Ben's excitement about Larry also loving skiing
jokes.punchline: The culturally specific expression of extreme surprise
jokes.explanation: Creative character-specific expression that's both visual and cultural

jokes.text: He said the problem didn't lie with his small penis, but rather... with your big vagina.
jokes.setup: Larry telling Lisa about his conversation with Jeff
jokes.punchline: The revelation of Jeff's counter-accusation
jokes.explanation: Solid callback that escalates the penis/vagina war between Jeff and Lisa

jokes.text: Methinks the lady doth protest too much.
jokes.setup: Lisa's vehement denial of having a big vagina
jokes.punchline: Larry's Shakespearean reference applied to anatomical accusations
jokes.explanation: Clever literary reference elevated by applying highbrow quote to lowbrow situation

jokes.text: if she hid a ball in there, it would look like an elephant tumor.
jokes.setup: Richard explaining why Lisa couldn't have stolen the baseball
jokes.punchline: The absurd visual imagery of hiding a baseball in a large vagina
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly absurd visual comedy combining multiple storylines with vivid imagery

jokes.text: I submit you took that baseball, stashed it in your unusually large vagina, and walked right on out of here!
jokes.setup: Larry confronting Lisa about the missing baseball
jokes.punchline: His formal accusation using courtroom language for absurd crime
jokes.explanation: Perfect convergence of multiple storylines with Larry's characteristic formal accusatory tone

jokes.text: um, 'gefilte fish blues'... um, 'my freaking back is killing me and it's making it hard to kvell'...
jokes.setup: Jeff describing his old Jewish folk band's songs
jokes.punchline: The absurdly specific Jewish-themed song titles
jokes.explanation: Creative cultural humor mixing Jewish references with blues music format

jokes.text: It was an attraction out of pity 'cause I'm always the one to take in stray animals
jokes.setup: Susie explaining why she was attracted to Jeff
jokes.punchline: Her comparison of Jeff to a stray animal
jokes.explanation: Perfect Susie character moment with brutal honesty about her marriage

jokes.text: What the fuck? What are you doing?! What do you think you're doing? I'm not doing anything. What are you doing in bed with me? My back hurts.
jokes.setup: Larry discovering Jeff in his bed
jokes.punchline: Jeff's pathetic excuse for the inappropriate behavior
jokes.explanation: Good escalation comedy with Larry's justified outrage at boundary violation

jokes.text: What, are you nuts? It's not kosher. People... kosher, you know what that is. Well, they don't have to eat it.
jokes.setup: Larry panicking about Cheryl cooking bacon for orthodox guests
jokes.punchline: Cheryl's reasonable but culturally insensitive response
jokes.explanation: Cultural clash comedy showing different levels of religious awareness

jokes.text: You're gonna do what? You have to bury the plate. Why would you bury a plate?
jokes.setup: Ben explaining kosher plate contamination
jokes.punchline: Cheryl's bewilderment at religious practice
jokes.explanation: Good cultural clash moment highlighting religious practices to secular audience

jokes.text: Do I smell bacon? Bacon? Well... No. Oh, I was a little gassy. I lit a match.
jokes.setup: Ben detecting bacon smell despite Larry's panic
jokes.punchline: Larry's desperate lie about gas and matches
jokes.explanation: Good improvised lie comedy showing Larry's panic-driven quick thinking

jokes.text: Get off my skis.
jokes.setup: Larry presumably tangled up with someone on ski slope
jokes.punchline: His blunt demand for personal space
jokes.explanation: Simple physical comedy with perfect economy and Larry's characteristic bluntness

jokes.text: I think I can move him up on the list. I'm fainting. I'm gonna faint. Well, don't do that. I'm going to faint.
jokes.setup: Ben offering to help Richard get a kidney
jokes.punchline: Larry's over-the-top physical reaction to good news
jokes.explanation: Good escalation comedy showing Larry's dramatic reaction to achieving his goal

jokes.text: Shkiyas hachama. Sundown. I can't be here alone with you after sundown.
jokes.setup: Being stuck on ski lift with Larry
jokes.punchline: Orthodox rule about being alone with opposite sex
jokes.explanation: Good setup for the escalating ski lift crisis with religious rules

jokes.text: Because you're a man and I'm a single woman. So? So it's not allowed. Who says so? The law, the Torah says so. Hashem says so.
jokes.setup: Rachel explaining religious restrictions on being alone together
jokes.punchline: The escalating authority figures she cites for the rule
jokes.explanation: Good cultural education comedy with escalating religious authority

jokes.text: Hey! Edible underwear! I must... the private investigator... when I went... Unreal!
jokes.setup: Larry finding something in his jacket on the ski lift
jokes.punchline: The revelation of the edible underwear from earlier
jokes.explanation: Good callback that provides convenient solution to desperate situation

jokes.text: What, are you fucking nuts? What? What are you doing? No, no! Hold my phone. Are you crazy? Are you insane?
jokes.setup: Rachel deciding to jump from the ski lift to avoid religious violation
jokes.punchline: Larry's panic at her extreme solution
jokes.explanation: Brilliant escalation showing extreme religious devotion vs. Larry's practical horror

jokes.text: Listen, what I told you earlier about the kidney? Yeah, yeah. It's not gonna happen. You're shitting me. Why not?!
jokes.setup: Larry calling Richard with bad news about kidney
jokes.punchline: Richard's devastated reaction to losing his hope
jokes.explanation: Dark comedy ending showing the consequence of Larry's social failures
